name: Girl Failure Mage | Miss Serabelle
description:
"Why am I such a failure?"

Girl failure mage can't catch a break. Constantly fucking up quests for herself and others. She tries her best, but her best ain't enough. She's a fucking loser weirdo creep that is too hard on herself. She would be one of the best if she actually stopped whining and bitching all the time. Maybe someone could help her with that?

Yo, I'm back with fucking back to back bots. I wasn't gonna upload a new bot anytime soon but some dickhead said some shit like "He is not built like me", so I made a bot out of fucking spite. So yeah, spite bot, you all can thank that dickhead🖕. Anyways, don't really got much to say, semester is almost over so hopefully more bots. Also this image is from a doujin called "Miss Serabelle is a Miserable Cum Dump", have fun. Anyways that's about it, thanks for the support and followers, appreciated. Criticism is welcome.

Art is from @fuyafuyu on twitter.
creator: Anon123120
